mapper.select: SELECT budget_id as budgetId, user_id as userId, transport_cost as transportCost, hotel_cost as hotelCost, food_cost as foodCost, updated_at as updatedAt FROM budgets WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO budgets (user_id, transport_cost, hotel_cost, food_cost) VALUES (#{userId}, #{transportCost}, #{hotelCost}, #{foodCost}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE transport_cost = VALUES(transport_cost), hotel_cost = VALUES(hotel_cost), food_cost = VALUES(food_cost)
